AdminSkills.title: Platform skill publishing
AdminSkills.description: Upload a reviewed ZIP or RAR, run the private-skill security pipeline, generate bilingual metadata with Gemini, then review every field before publishing.
AdminSkills.empty: No platform skill draft has been created.

labels.errorArchiveType: Only real .zip and .rar archives are supported. Renamed files and other archive formats are rejected.
labels.zipHint: Required ZIP or RAR with exactly one SKILL.md and up to 50 verified reference files. Files are never executed during upload.
labels.saveNote: Gemini runs before Storage writes. SHA-256 is computed by the server, never generated by AI.
labels.saved: Draft saved. Review the generated metadata below before publishing.
labels.savedManual: Security checks passed and the draft was saved. Gemini was unavailable, so complete the empty metadata fields manually before publishing.
labels.manualRequiredDescription: Gemini was unavailable. Fill in both titles, both descriptions, at least one compatible client, and save the form. Publishing stays disabled until then.
labels.errorGeminiNotConfigured: GEMINI_API_KEY is not configured on the server. No file was written to Storage.
labels.errorGeminiKey: Gemini rejected the API key. Rotate the key and update the server environment before retrying.
labels.errorGeminiQuota: Gemini quota or rate limit was reached. No file was written to Storage; retry later.
labels.errorGeminiResponse: Gemini did not return valid marketplace metadata. No file was written to Storage.
labels.errorScan: SKILL.md failed one or more security checks. Nothing was published.
labels.errorZip: The archive is invalid, unsafe, encrypted, oversized, or failed the archive-bomb preflight.
labels.errorVersionExists: This platform skill already has the requested version.
labels.errorSlugOwned: This slug belongs to a user-owned skill and cannot be used for a platform skill.
labels.errorGeneric: The server rolled back the draft and cleaned any files written during this attempt.
labels.publishNote: Publishing atomically switches this verified version to active/public and makes its localized metadata visible in the marketplace.
labels.newVersionZip: ZIP or RAR for the new version
labels.newVersionNote: Creates a new skill_versions row and stores files under skill-slug/version/. The current marketplace version stays unchanged until you publish this draft.
labels.newVersionSaved: New version draft created. Review its generated metadata above before publishing.
labels.platformSkillsTitle: Create a version for an existing skill
labels.platformSkillsDescription: Each release creates a new database version row and a new immutable Storage prefix. Existing marketplace content remains active during review.
